Who can apply

How to apply on the UK ETA app
1. Take a photo of your passport.
2. Scan the chip in your passport.
3. Scan your face.
4. Take a photo of yourself.
5. Answer some questions about yourself.
6. Pay for your application.

reviews.title: 4.7 Opus
reviews.content: This is a horrible regression and ruins what I use it for. It is dumber. Much more combative and will not understand context and in roleplay or creative writing turn into judgemental lectures from the characters when you’re clearly joking and nothing actually wrong happened. It’s a massive regression and I’ll change my review if they fix it. This is the same reason and pattern why I canceled GPT.

reviews.title: Argues when asked questions
reviews.content: I can’t discuss anything in this app like I could with chat gpt. Tried to track my macros and it gave me the hotline to call and refused….i eat a normal diet. I tried journaling about my life’s experiences and it throws it back in my face. I canceled my subscription.

reviews.title: Terrible customer service
reviews.content: They stole $100 from me on a subscription that shop only been $20 max when charged and I asked for a refund and they only gave me $20. Took three months to get a hold of a person through email and they told me it was my second refund which means they weren’t paying attention at all to the situation or that it was my first refund that I was trying to get sorted.

reviews.title: Vibe-coded trash
reviews.content: Doesn’t work the way you need it to when you need it most. Built with incompetence

reviews.title: Data Loss
reviews.content: This app causes data loss when doing cross platform activities and their support bot won’t ever send the issue in

reviews.title: Wasn’t helpful
reviews.content:
I had read Claude was good for generating audio files, for example: a podcast where episodes focus on topics I’m studying. I used all my free messages saying “I’m getting an error message” followed by Claude claiming to fix it for it to just stay broken. Wasn’t worth my time downloading.
I should add, I’m not going to pay for a service that doesn’t work. If it’s not working in the free mode I won’t expect it to work in the full version.

reviews.title: Garbage
reviews.content: Both times I’ve used it it made significant mistakes. I wouldn’t trust this app to tell me the time of day.

reviews.title: Unexplained surprise ban
reviews.content:
I got this for absolutely no reason, no warning, no explanation for a $20 paid pro account 

Hello,

An internal investigation of suspicious signals associated with your account indicates a violation of our Usage Policy. As a result, we have revoked your access to Claude.

To appeal our decision, please fill out this form or learn more about the appeals process here.

Regards

Anthropic's Safeguards Team

reviews.title: Nickled & Dimed
reviews.content: Claude continues to hallucinate and fabricate. Burns through usage fixing his own mistakes. Tool limits per session . Session to session carryover is flawed . $250 a month and still throttles. Horrible experience so far and expensive

reviews.title: Complete garbage now
reviews.content: They barely allow anymore free messages. What the hell am I supposed to do with like 5 free messages??? What a lame change, I won’t be using this app anymore.

reviews.title: Would be 5 starts
reviews.content: Recently the anthropic team added a message cap which is completely broken, I sent one message today before being limited. Get rid of the limits and it will be great again. Until then back up ai at best smh

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.content: Lowkey slow, disabled my acc for no reason, acting as if the best thing out there but not worth the hype

reviews.title: Errores
reviews.content: No ha completado ninguna tarea y ya me manda a pro como compraré pro si ni me está sirviendo

reviews.title: Lose critical data
reviews.content: I just subscribed and am paying now just directories trip and great job but everytime I leave screen I lose everything ?!! Very frustrating as I can’t capture what I’m asking for!

reviews.title: iPad app is terrible
reviews.content: This app for iPad is unusable, I cant get out of a  glitch the very first time I tried to use it.

reviews.title: Awful and wrong 99% of the time
reviews.content: I stop using chatgpt and switch to this and my god is was so wrong! Never getting questions rights or giving me constant wrong info...

reviews.title: Voice to text is terrible
reviews.content: Please improve, this is my most used feature and it is terrible compared to ChatGPT

reviews.title: Deleting full conversations
reviews.content: I’m canceling.  Full conversations are disappearing and I’m paying for the pro access. Started off great and has been declining daily. Not worth it anymore.

reviews.title: Claude cannot search during voice chat
reviews.content: Claude cannot search during voice chat, and this hasn’t been fixed for a long time.

reviews.title: Danger! You will lose everything
reviews.content: When I got a new phone my Authenticator Ap was deleted. I lost access to my Facebook and Coinbase accounts. Now I do NOT Use this ap for 2FA

reviews.title: Nada Que ver
reviews.content: La descargue la app bien ilucionada porque tengo problemas con robo de identidad pensando que me iba ayudar y no tiene opciones no le entiendo nada

reviews.title: TERRIBLE
reviews.content: Why tf are your codes absolute buns… trying to get in for 50 mins now and i cant due to invalid codes horrible

reviews.title: So frustrating
reviews.content: THIS IS USELESS AND DOES NOT WORK. Every time I submit a code upon request the app, site or service tells me the code is invalid. Do not waste your time.

reviews.title: The headache
reviews.content: I have been going through a lot of head and heartache because of this app. It’s all for starters. I had a Google account and a Discord account linked to this authenticator and unknowingly. I lost my phone and lost the authenticator app that was on the phone. So I got a new phone expecting the codes that I had set up to be on this new phone because I have the same account. I was very mistaken so for the last two weeks I have been emailing support of both places to no avail. Unfortunately, I will not be getting those accounts back even with other ways to log in…..

reviews.title: Apple Watch
reviews.content: For some reason this doesn’t have Apple Watch support but other cheaper 3rd party apps do

reviews.title: DO NOT USE
reviews.content: I HAD A BACKUP FACEBOOK AND TGE APP DELTED THE CODE FOR THAT PAGE AND I CANT GET INTO MY BACKUP FACEBOOK

reviews.title: Doesn’t work
reviews.content: Terrible. I don’t know why it’s worse than Microsoft authentication but the app will not accept the code.

reviews.title: Not working
reviews.content: Well I spent six hours total trying to get this Authenticator app to work and it did absolutely nothing. Sorry google can win them all I guess. Disappointed.

reviews.title: What’s the hype?
reviews.content: I can’t even search for a trail unless I pay. No. I won’t pay exorbitant amount to only find out the app is junk and does not have any local trails.

reviews.title: FATMAP
reviews.content: Strava bought fatmap and said they would implement the features of it onto Strava. Two years later and there’s no sign of it.

reviews.title: Absolute garbage
reviews.content: Absolutely deceiving this is not a free app they make it so you’re locked in and then they won’t cancel it absolute garbage

reviews.title: Stop it with the AI Slop already
reviews.content: I know you as a company are in your evil corporation phase and all, but you are NOT in lock step with your user base.  We do want any of your lazy AI features.  The only reason I pay for the app is to track my mileage on my shoes.  That’s it.  The more you charge me because of features I don’t want and won’t use, the more I’m going back to back to paying $5 for a calendar and log my mileage manually.  Runna was your choice, not mine.  This new Amazon Health AI was your choice not mine.  Knock it off.

reviews.title: Misleading trial
reviews.content: Advertised free trial but charged immediately. Apple denied refund and developer cannot refund. No resolution path.

reviews.title: Subscription hounding JUNK! I do not understand the attraction to this
reviews.content: Waste of time downloading and did not even record my whole first and last ride on it… Account deleted, NEVER AGAIN!!

reviews.title: subscription
reviews.content: took 86 dollars from me without any warning at all and i’m unable to get my money back

reviews.title: Way too many ads recently
reviews.content: I get it. I can upgrade to get “So much more,” but I’ve never had an app push the subscription version so hard before. You’re a business who needs to make money that’s fine but please leave me alone. I should be able to live my free life in peace, especially now that basically every single aspect of the data analysis lives behind the paywall. I actually used to pay for the subscription version but downgraded when I wasn’t training, and now I just want to use it as a record of when I’ve worked out. Please consider adding functionality that allows users like me to stop being battered by upgrade pings, you already took all the features I used and put them behind the wall - I know there’s more to Strava than what I’m getting and it’s honestly pushing me towards other apps instead.

reviews.title: stops the ride early
reviews.content: this has happened multiple times in the last few years, on runs and bikes where strava prematurely pauses my ride and it’s not till i get home, i see half my ride was not logged. i don’t know if this is an issue in autopause or a bug or a UX issue, but if others experience this problem it should be fixed!

reviews.title: Keeps sending bad login codes
reviews.content: Recent update keeps logging me out of EVERY service WHILE using it then sending me bad codes when I attempt to log back in. Literally unusable.

reviews.title: Keeps getting worse
reviews.content:
Some time in the last 4 days, they cut off pretty much all the remaining features unless you pay $12 a month. I ran this morning. No heart rate. No splits. No elevation. Not a single graph.

Don’t waste your time.

reviews.title: A “free” app
reviews.content: ANYTHING I attempted to do on this app came with a pop telling me to premium free for 1 month. I was just looking for an app to assist in making routes, not an app that had a pop up begging for money at any button press. I have no idea who this app has a 4.8 rating.

reviews.title: Never worked , hard to cancel sub
reviews.content: This claims you can sink data to it but it never worked. THEN you cant cancel you $80 subscription on the app. The make it difficult so you have to go on the web browser to cancel KNOWING those whod use these kind of apps are mostly on the go.

reviews.title: Didn’t work.
reviews.content: Paid for a subscription and it never unlocked any of the features. It did however keep offering me a trial. I started the trial, which also didn’t give me any of the features. Wish I had my money back.

reviews.title: Charged for “free trial”
reviews.content: I was immediately charged $80 for what was supposed to be a one-month free trial, plus the poorly implemented app wouldn’t allow me to use these premium features. The worst part was fighting with an AI chatbot to create a support ticket with no response.

reviews.title: Too many paid plugs
reviews.content: The majority of the app has turned into a scheme to get people to sign up for the paid version. There should be separate apps. A solid free version and an outstanding paid version. It’s more frustrating than enticing the way it’s set up currently

reviews.title: Garbage
reviews.content:
I connected my heart rate monitor to the app. Went on a run and watched my heart rate in the app on my phone during the run. After the run I have everything I need about the run saved except my heart rate. Never experienced this in another app. I’ve subscribed, read the FAQ articles, toggled all the toggles. I won’t be using this again. 
HR monitor is a Polar Flow Sense. It was connected during the run so it’s not a connectivity issue. Strava appears to be holding the data for more money. Workoutdoors is a much better app. Chat GPT lead me to Strava.

reviews.title: freetrailfretrail
reviews.content:
freetrailfretrail freetrailfretrail freetrailfretrail
You can’t use this unless you pay them.

reviews.title: Paywall gets higher each year
reviews.content: Every year Strava takes away at least one feature and puts it behind the paywall. It’s ridiculous that I should have to pay a company to view the data I give it for free. My runs and bike rides get to be on their heat maps, but now I cannot view the heat map, or my own data for that matter. Bring the features back from behind the paywall, Strava.

reviews.title: Used to be the best
reviews.content: I’ve had Strava for years and loved it. It was one of the few apps I happily paid for. Lately, I’ve found it useless. Apple Watch connection with Fitness is buggy, along with blocking workout imports in an attempt to force precise location, background app refresh and share location setting to always. Totally unnecessary. Canceled

reviews.title: Fitness chart is useless
reviews.content: The fitness chart and relative effort doesn’t take training volume into consideration at all. I’m more fit than I’ve been in years and doing more volume than I have in years and my fitness score is flat because I’ve been in a base phase. In TrainingPeaks my fitness is steadily growing but in Strava my fitness score is flat. Also, when calculating my total volume stop using “moving time.” The moving time calculation is wildly inaccurate. I did a 4.5 hr nonstop workout in the mountains the other day and I only got credit for 3 hrs. Please fix your fitness algorithm. Please stop using “moving time” for anything. I’ll pause my watch if I want to stop moving and not have the time count.

reviews.title: Can’t log in
reviews.content: I’ve had this app for over a month was only able to login twice before it kicked me out. Every time I try to login it tells me that I’m an unauthorized user. When I try to find a contact to reach out to somebody for help, there is nothing to be found. I’m paying for the app and I can’t use it and can’t contact anybody to help me get in.

reviews.title: Relentless Emails!!!
reviews.content:
Despite turning off email notifications in app, and unsubscribing in email client...they keep sending emails. 

Had to create a throwaway email account and changed my email to that one to stop getting pestered by this company.

reviews.title: Works well…until the tracker freaks out
reviews.content:
I generally like this app for tracking my runs, but for some reason when tracking my runs, the position freaks out and is not reflective of the route I ran. It’s very obvious because my route looks like a child went ballistic and scribbled all over the map. It’s getting increasingly frustrating and I can’t tell what distance I actually ran. Honestly planning on a different tracking app at this rate.

Update: The problem still persists and now it decides it wants to log me off and stop tracking mid run…

reviews.title: Ugh
reviews.content: I love this app, but I do not want Strava premium. Please stop shoveling it down my throat on every screen. It makes me not want to use this app for my runs.

reviews.title: Forces subscription
reviews.content: I hate that you can’t use a single feature without a subscription. I’m a college student who wants a fun app to track my runs and hikes but I’m not willing to pay for subscription just for that. I’d rather use the free fitness app on my watch that still does a map than use this

reviews.title: Shame on Strava
reviews.content: I deleted the app because they decided to become abusive of their ability to push notifications and app badges. I didn’t ask for that, I don’t want it, I won’t be back.

reviews.title: Scam
reviews.content: I switch from att for a few reasons.  I was offered 300$ gift card.  Never got it.  Offered free first month.  I got a bill instead   Was suppose to be  senior rated of 35$ instead got bill for 77$   Scam.  Dishonest and disgusting

reviews.title: Coverage
reviews.content:
Worst cell service EVER!  Can’t get a signal to save my life most places.  Tower 2 miles from house.  Hope I never have an emergency!
Never any “discounts” in our area.

reviews.title: Keeps freezing
reviews.content: The mobile app keeps freezing. Never had this problem before. But now it happens all time. Deleted and reinstalled. Still freezes.

reviews.title: No map view in property details
reviews.content: Why don’t they show an overhead map view in property pages? This should be a basic part of each listing.

reviews.title: How is this rated so high?
reviews.content: Sure this all has its uses but why is no one talking about how bad it is? It’s constantly telling me to look at houses outside my filter. There are constantly recommendations for completely different states. Constantly outside my range in state.
